zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont於1340年4月4日出生在荷蘭布拉班特時，他的父親John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont22歲，母親Eleanor of Lancaster21歲。他於1359年與Margaret de Vere結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1342年被列為3rd lord beaumont 。他去世於1369年7月25日在英國薩默塞特斯特林斯頓享年29歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont was born on 4 April 1340, in Brabant, Netherlands, his father, John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont, was 22 and his mother, Eleanor of Lancaster, was 21. He married Margaret de Vere in 1359. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1342, at the age of 2, his occupation is listed as 3rd lord beaumont . He died on 25 July 1369, in Stringston, Somerset, England, at the age of 29, and was buried in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont est né le 4 avril 1340, à Brabant, Pays-Bas, son père, John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Eleanor of Lancaster, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Vere en 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1342, à l’âge de 2 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est 3rd lord beaumont . Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1369, à Stringston, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont am 4. April 1340 in Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont 22 und seine Mutter Eleanor of Lancaster 21. Er hat 1359 Margaret de Vere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1342, als er 2 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als 3rd lord beaumont  aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. Juli 1369 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Stringston, Somerset, England und wurde in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret de Vere nel 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1342, all'età di 2 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come 3rd lord beaumont . Morì il 25 luglio 1369, nel Stringston, Somerset, England, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumontが1340年4月4日にオランダブラバントで生まれた時，父John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumontは22歳，母Eleanor of Lancasterは21歳であった。1359年にMargaret de Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1342年，2歳の時，職業は3rd lord beaumont と記録されている。彼は1369年7月25日にイギリスソメルセトストリングストンで29歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアセンプリンガム ウィス ポイントン アンド バーソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont(이)가 1340년 4월 4일 네덜란드 브라반트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor of Lancaster(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1359년 Margaret de Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1342년, 2세의 나이로 그의 직업은 3rd lord beaumont 이었다. 그는 1369년 7월 25일 영국 서머세트 스트링스턴에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 젬플링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont nasceu em 4 de abril de 1340, em Brabant, Países Baixos, seu pai, John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor of Lancaster, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Vere em 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1342, com 2 anos, sua profissão aparece como 3rd lord beaumont . Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1369, em Stringston, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont родился 4 апреля 1340 г. в местности брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor of Lancaster, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Vere в 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1342 году, в возрасте 2 лет,  он работал по профессии 3rd lord beaumont . Он умер 25 июля 1369 г. в местности стрингстон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности семпрингхам вит поинтон анд биртаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont nació el 4 de abril de 1340, en Brabant, Países Bajos, su papá, John de Beaumont 2nd Lord Beaumont, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Eleanor of Lancaster, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret de Vere en 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1342, a la edad de 2 años, su ocupación registrada era 3rd lord beaumont . Murió el 25 de julio de 1369, en Stringston, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
